shopWithConfidence: Payments held in escrow until you confirm delivery with OTP.
workspace_blurb: Move between your overview, operational pages, and account settings.
home_title: Browse shops by category and city across Eastern Ethiopia
home_subtitle: Discover trusted shops first, then open any shop to see the products it offers. Payments stay protected with escrow and OTP delivery confirmation.
home_escrowBody: Funds release only after you confirm delivery.
home_aiBody: Ask in Amharic, Afaan Oromo, or English.
home_noShopsTitle: No shops found for this city
home_noShopsBody: Try another city from the top filter bar or clear the filter to browse all shops.
catalog_noResultsDesc: Try clearing a filter, broadening your search keywords, or publishing more active catalog items.
auth_tagline: Sign in or create an account. Your profile is stored in Supabase Auth.
auth_desc_signin: Use the email and password for your marketplace account.
auth_desc_signup: We save your name, role, zone, and language on your Supabase user profile.
auth_google_hint: Configure the Google provider in Supabase Authentication settings if this button errors.
auth_admin_note: Admin accounts are created by platform staff, not here.
auth_toggle_signin: Already have an account? Sign in
auth_toast_passwordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth_toast_created: Account created. You are signed in.
auth_toast_confirmEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.
auth_redirectHint: {message} — In Supabase: Authentication → URL configuration, add {origin}/auth/callback to Redirect URLs.
checkout_loadingCart: Loading your saved cart before checkout…
checkout_emptyBody: Sign in as a buyer, add items from the catalog, then complete payment here.
checkout_buyerOnlyBodyAuthed: Seller, runner, and admin accounts cannot place marketplace orders. Use a buyer account to check out.
checkout_buyerOnlyBodyGuest: Sign in with a buyer account to review your cart and pay.
checkout_sync_ok: Your buyer cart is synced. Payment here creates real marketplace orders in escrow.
checkout_sync_wait: Finish cart sync before paying — checkout works only with a signed-in buyer cart.
checkout_subtitle: Review the buyer details, confirm delivery coverage, choose a payment method, and send the order into escrow.
checkout_buyerDetailsHint: These details will be attached to the checkout and delivery handoff.
checkout_deliverySummaryHint: Current delivery zone and multi-shop handoff estimate for this cart.
checkout_paymentHint: Pick the payment rail you want to use for this checkout.
checkout_note_chapa: Submitting now will create live marketplace orders and record Chapa as the selected payment provider.
checkout_note_mpesa: Submitting now will create live marketplace orders and record an M-Pesa payment using {kes} KES as the demo conversion reference.
checkout_note_sync: Connect your buyer cart (sign in with sync OK) before paying.
checkout_pay_chapa_desc: Hosted checkout style sandbox for cards, bank transfer, and wallets.
checkout_pay_mpesa_desc: Mobile push payment sandbox for Kenyan buyers paying in KES.
checkout_toast_empty: Add products to your cart before starting checkout.
checkout_toast_buyer: Sign in with a buyer account to check out.
checkout_toast_sync: Your saved buyer cart is not ready. Try signing in again or retry sync.
checkout_toast_name: Enter the customer name for this checkout.
checkout_toast_chapaEmail: Enter an email to simulate the Chapa sandbox checkout.
checkout_success_multi: Created {count} marketplace orders. View them in order history.
checkout_success_single: {provider} marketplace payment is now in escrow.
account_description: Review your profile, keep delivery preferences in sync, and jump back into your role workspace.
account_profileSummaryDesc: The current signed-in account details, role, and joined date.
account_updateDesc: Save the settings that should follow this signed-in account across checkout, dashboards, and fulfillment.
account_passwordHintPrefix: Password changes use Supabase: sign out, then use
account_passwordHintSuffix: and “Forgot password” on the auth page if your project has it enabled.
account_sessionDesc: End this browser session on this device. You can sign in again anytime from the marketplace.
account_sessionBody: Your profile name, phone, delivery zone, and language are stored with your Supabase account. Use Save changes above before signing out if you edited those fields.
